attributes.readMe:
# Usage Documentation for Address Field Spec ## Summary The `Address` field spec provides a way to represent and display an address within a Boxel card or field. ## Import ```javascript import { Address } from '../address'; ``` ## Usage as a Field To use the `Address` field spec within a consuming card or field, you can add it as a field definition: ```typescript export class MyCard extends CardDef { address = Address.field(); } ``` This will include the `address` field in your card, allowing you to display and interact with address data. ## Template Usage Within the template of your consuming card or field, you can access the `address` field and render its content: ```handlebars
{{@fields.address.street1}} {{@fields.address.street2}} {{@fields.address.city}}, {{@fields.address.state}} {{@fields.address.zip}}
``` This will display the various address components (street, city, state, zip) in the template.
